MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2022 ASSIGNED TO JURY TRIAL CALENDAR ON DEC-12-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 303, JUDGE SUZANNE RAMOS BOLANOS. JOHN MILLER, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. ABHIRAJ CHOWDHURY, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS KAREN SERRANO, GERARDO SERRANO AND VILMA SERRANO VIA COURTCALL. SANCTIONS IS IMPOSED ON PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY, JOHN MILLER IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE 12/29/22. SANCTIONS IS IMPOSED ON DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY, ABHIRAJ CHOWDHURY IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE 12/29/22. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS SET ON DEC-30-2022 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES TO CONTACT DEPARTMENT 303 BY THE E-MAIL ADDRESS PROVIDED TO THEM AT TRIAL CALL NO LATER THAN 4:00PM TODAY. THE COURTROOOM'S TELEPHONE NUMBER WAS ALSO GIVEN TO THE PARTIES. TIME ESTIMATE: 5-7 DAYS. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
